name: L-Theanine Sleep Use
summary: L-theanine has limited-moderate evidence for sleep quality, especially stress-related sleep disturbance.
description: L-theanine for sleep is used based on CNS-calming plausibility, including modulation of glutamatergic signaling and stress arousal; evidence varies by formulation and dose.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
dosage: Use L-theanine parent dose runtime: practical adult sleep-support range around 200–450 mg/day, with trials spanning 50–900 mg/day. | Standalone L-theanine preferred for this use-case; combination formulas need separate source rows. | This should probably be a goal/use-case view of L-theanine, not a separate ingredient entity unless the architecture needs use-specific slugs.
